raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/AuthServic: Apple first-auth name capture signals observers (authNameDidUpdate) and persists the name to Firebase so it survives reinstalls.
raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/DesktopAut: present_onboarding_opener QA action renders the real post-onboarding opener in-process for verification.
raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/MemoryExpo: Adds cloudOAuthGrantClientIDs so ChatGPT directory grants (always omi-chatgpt-prod) verify on dev/Beta builds, fixing the connector chip never flipping to connected.
raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/OmiApp.swi: Current main already contains 1693 lines after the menu-bar summon and chat-landing additions; this PR changes the Firebase-missing launch branch without increasing that count.
